name: eba-protokoll-cowork
description: Codex plugin for generating EBA-conform meeting protocols from raw transcripts using the original QMG templates.

interface.shortDescription: Create EBA protocol documents from transcripts.
interface.longDescription: Use Codex to turn EBA Protokoll App transcripts into QMG-based protocols, including Word and Excel outputs and transcript preparation helpers.
defaultPrompt: Create a protocol from this transcript.
Generate the correct EBA template output.
